ArtifactPayloadViewV1.description: Verified, schema-bound payload for an already authorized Artifact.
ArtifactPayloadViewV1.title: ArtifactPayloadViewV1

ArtifactSummaryV1.description: Safe immutable Artifact projection without object-store coordinates or free-form meta.
ArtifactSummaryV1.title: ArtifactSummaryV1

CostUsageViewV1.description: Public cost observation without request, routing, reservation, or fencing internals.
CostUsageViewV1.title: CostUsageViewV1

FindingPayloadV1.description: Identity-free semantic payload embedded by an immutable finding revision.
FindingPayloadV1.title: FindingPayloadV1

FindingRevisionV1.description: Stable finding series identity plus one immutable semantic revision.
FindingRevisionV1.title: FindingRevisionV1

GenerationProposeRequestV1.description:
``POST /generation:propose`` — fixes ``generation.propose@1``.

The naked ``objective_goal_text`` is turned into an authenticated ``source_raw``
Artifact by the composition root before the Run is created.
GenerationProposeRequestV1.title: GenerationProposeRequestV1

JsonValueState.description: A JSON value whose absent and explicitly-null states cannot collapse.
JsonValueState.title: JsonValueState

PatchArtifactReadViewV1.description: Workflow Patch projection with its stable Artifact identity.
PatchArtifactReadViewV1.title: PatchArtifactReadViewV1

PatchV2.description: Immutable Patch payload; mutable workflow state lives in ApprovalItem.
PatchV2.title: PatchV2

RollbackRequestReadViewV1.description: Rollback workflow projection with its stable Artifact identity.
RollbackRequestReadViewV1.title: RollbackRequestReadViewV1

RunCostViewV1.description: Bounded, cursor-paged public cost view for one authorized Run.
RunCostViewV1.title: RunCostViewV1

RunSubmissionRequestV1.title: RunSubmissionRequestV1

VersionTuple.description: The frozen ten-field tuple; optional means not applicable, not unknown.
VersionTuple.title: VersionTuple

ApiKeyAuth.description: Service credential presented as `Authorization: ApiKey <secret>`. The secret is validated against a hashed key store; the plaintext is never stored, logged, or echoed.
ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization

SessionCookie.description: Browser session cookie issued by POST /auth/login. Attributes: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict, Path=/. Mutating requests must also present the X-CSRF-Token header returned by login (double-submit CSRF); the Origin/Referer is validated by the authentication middleware.
SessionCookie.name: gameforge_session

200.description: A stream of Server-Sent Events (`text/event-stream`). Each event's `data:` line is a canonical-JSON RunEvent (see schemas/sse-run-event-v1.json); the SSE `id:` is the persisted event `seq`, echoed via `Last-Event-ID` to resume. Comment lines (`:` keep-alive) do not advance the cursor.

Cache-Control.description: Always `no-store` for the event stream.

X-Accel-Buffering.description: Always `no` so proxies do not buffer the stream.

X-Earliest-Event-Cursor.description: Earliest retained event `seq`; a resume below it fails 410.
